display_name: Furstenberg ×2×3 猜想（零熵情形，前沿辅助）
benchmark_scope: Prove the zero-entropy case of Furstenberg's conjecture: any ergodic T_2-and-T_3-invariant measure with h=0 is purely atomic (a uniform measure on a finite orbit). Rudolph's theorem already handles h>0; the h=0 case is the remaining open part.
planning_constraints: Frontier ergodic-theory partial results may be used as seeds, but you must isolate the exact remaining obstruction in the zero-entropy case.
Do not claim the problem is solved by importing positive-entropy or disjointness technology alone.
Any use of frontier theorems should be turned into explicit bridge propositions describing what gap they leave.
